title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSR & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at BSR & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co:
BSR & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
